brief: Iran escalates conflict with Gulf states while US senator Lindsey Graham dies; research papers explore missing data imputation and traditional Chinese painting analysis.
news_summary: Iran attacks Gulf countries and hard-liners push for continued fight; Senator Lindsey Graham dies suddenly; wildfires in Spain trap British couple.
papers_summary: Papers cover visual analytics for missing data, AI in crime linkage, brain-computer interface trials, and a composition-graph system for traditional Chinese paintings.

en.brief: Iran escalates conflict with Gulf states while US senator Lindsey Graham dies; research papers explore missing data imputation and traditional Chinese painting analysis.
en.news_summary: Iran attacks Gulf countries and hard-liners push for continued fight; Senator Lindsey Graham dies suddenly; wildfires in Spain trap British couple.
en.papers_summary: Papers cover visual analytics for missing data, AI in crime linkage, brain-computer interface trials, and a composition-graph system for traditional Chinese paintings.

zh.brief: 中国连续遭遇台风袭击，近200万人疏散；韩国寺庙举办静修相亲活动。论文方面，今日无中文论文。
zh.news_summary: 台风巴威一周内两次登陆浙江，造成近200万人疏散；温州等地提前采取防范措施。此外，韩国一座寺庙举办静修相亲活动，帮助单身男女寻找爱情；关于蚊虫叮咬的研究解释了为何有些人更易被叮。
zh.papers_summary: 今日没有来自中文来源的论文。英文论文中，一项研究利用组合图可视化分析中国传统绘画的构图，另一项关注中国脑机接口临床转化。

todays_image.caption: Just as a saucer hovers unseen in the sky, hard-liners in Iran keep their aggression toward America suspended in a stubborn, unresolved standoff.
todays_image.title: Saucer
